situation: clean single-task update with explicit progress
input_text: Color uniformity test rig is going well, we're about 60 percent done. Should wrap up the remaining sensor mounts by Friday.
notes: Baseline easy case. Tests progress parsing and a single next step.

input_text: Japan-side review pipeline is stuck. Two things blocking us: we still don't have sample data approval from Tokyo, and the review tool license expired. Also flagging a risk that if approval slips past mid-June the whole September demo timeline is at risk.

blockers.description: No sample data approval from Tokyo

risks.description: Approval slipping past mid-June endangers the September demo

notes: Tests multiple blockers with different severities and a separate risk.

input_text: Noise suppression model done. Starting field recording collection next.
notes: Tests terse input and a next step that names a different known task.

input_text: So yeah this week was kind of busy, lots of meetings honestly, but on the speaker separation module I managed to get the basic pipeline running, I'd say maybe a third of the way there, still need to handle overlapping speech which is the hard part. Nothing really blocking me right now.
notes: Tests pulling structure out of chatty filler and an approximate progress phrase.

situation: progress and next step, no blockers
input_text: Calibration dataset prep is around 45 percent. Next I'll label the remaining panel batches and hand them to Neeraj for review.

next_steps.description: Label remaining panel batches and hand to Neeraj for review

notes: Tests owner detection from a handoff phrase.

situation: mentions a project not in the world
input_text: Made good progress on the PlayStation haptics demo, about half done.
notes: Tests that an unknown project is marked unknown, not force-matched.

situation: two tasks mentioned in one update
input_text: Quick double update: Japanese ASR accuracy test is at 70 percent and looking good. Separately, speaker separation module is blocked because the GPU server is fully booked this week.

blockers.description: GPU server fully booked this week

notes: Hard case: two tasks in one update. Tests whether the model splits them. 'secondary' holds the second task.

situation: a previously blocking item is now resolved
input_text: Good news, the sample data approval from Tokyo finally came through, so the Japan-side review pipeline is unblocked and moving again. Back to about 30 percent.
notes: Tests a blocker marked resolved rather than open, and status flipping back to in_progress.

input_text: Field recording collection is on track at 55 percent. One risk worth noting: monsoon season may delay outdoor recordings next month. Planning to do indoor sessions as backup.

risks.description: Monsoon may delay outdoor recordings next month

notes: Tests a risk with a mitigation, and no blocker.

input_text: Looked into the color uniformity test rig a bit this week.
notes: Low-information input. Tests that the model does not invent progress or blockers. Confidence should be low.

input_text: 色均一性テストリグは順調で、進捗はおよそ60パーセントです。残りのセンサー取り付けは金曜日までに完了予定です。

next_steps.description: 残りのセンサー取り付けを完了する

notes: Japanese mirror of ex_001. Tests JP extraction into the same schema.

situation: polite business Japanese with a blocker
input_text: お疲れ様です。日本側レビューパイプラインの件ですが、東京からのサンプルデータ承認がまだ得られておらず、作業がブロックされている状況です。重要度は高いと考えております。

blockers.description: 東京からのサンプルデータ承認が未取得

notes: Tests polite business JP and severity inferred from 重要度は高い.

input_text: ノイズ抑制モデル完了。次はフィールド録音収集に着手します。

next_steps.description: フィールド録音収集に着手する

notes: JP terse done + next step. Mirror of ex_003.

input_text: キャリブレーションデータ準備は約45パーセントです。次は残りのパネルバッチにラベル付けを行い、レビューのためニーラジさんに渡します。

next_steps.description: 残りのパネルバッチにラベル付けし、ニーラジさんにレビューを依頼する

notes: Tests JP owner detection where a name is written in katakana (ニーラジ -> Neeraj).

input_text: フィールド録音収集は55パーセントで順調です。リスクとして、来月は雨季のため屋外録音が遅れる可能性があります。対策として屋内セッションを予定しています。

risks.description: 来月、雨季のため屋外録音が遅れる可能性
risks.mitigation: 屋内セッションを実施

notes: JP risk with mitigation. Mirror of ex_009.

input_text: Speaker separation module の進捗ですが、basic pipeline は動くようになりました。だいたい30パーセントくらいです。overlapping speech の処理がまだ残っています。

next_steps.description: overlapping speech の処理を行う

notes: India-Japan reality: English technical terms inside Japanese sentences. Tests robustness to code-switching.

input_text: Xperia mic array の noise suppression model は基本的にできたけど、GPU が足りなくて large model の training が blocked です。

blockers.description: Insufficient GPU to train the large model

notes: Reverse code-switch: Japanese grammar wrapping English terms. Tests blocker detection across languages.

input_text: Speaker separation module update: Shivam is taking over the overlapping-speech work, target June 20. Abhishake will run the accuracy benchmark after that. Currently around 40 percent.
notes: Tests multiple owners and an explicit date normalized to ISO.

input_text: Japanese ASR accuracy test is finished and signed off. Final accuracy hit our target.
notes: Clean done case in English.

input_text: 日本語ASR精度テストは完了し、承認も得られました。最終精度は目標を達成しています。
notes: JP done case. Mirror of ex_019.

situation: update with an explicit reporting week
input_text: Week of June 8: color uniformity test rig moved from 60 to 75 percent. On track.
notes: Tests period extraction and taking the latest progress value (75, not 60).

input_text: Things are moving along, nothing major to report this week.
notes: Almost no signal. Tests that the model returns empties instead of hallucinating. Confidence should be very low.
